text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The race of my dreams is coming<n>true! Doto's
first G1 with Opera O...<n>My oshis are gonna run
together in a<n>G1!!!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know full well a little classic-year<n>pipsqueak like
me doesn't stand a<n>chance! But still... Even if
that's true...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm getting the best seat in the<n>house!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital throws herself to the<n>ground and
grovels before taking on<n>the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Here they are... in the flesh. I-I-I'm<n>seeing them
with my own two eyes!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting for this moment,<n>Doto! ♪ Come
at me with everything<n>you can muster!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I knew this would be asacred event, but it's like all of myfantasies are coming true!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Which means today, I've got to run<n>serious
enough to do my fantasies<n>justice.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today, Agnes Digital is going to show<n>everyone
just how good she can<n>make the other two look
as she runs.
